query: SELECT ss.orderId, ss.sceneIndex, ss.status, LEFT(ss.illustrationUrl, 150) as illUrl, LEFT(ss.narrationUrl, 100) as narUrl FROM story_scenes ss WHERE ss.orderId IN (510001, 480001, 450001) ORDER BY ss.orderId, ss.sceneIndex LIMIT 20;
